title: stanleya tomentosa var. typica
intro: Stanleya tomentosa var. typica, also known as the Live Forever plant, is a perennial succulent native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The plant's health benefits also include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Stanleya tomentosa var. typica include decoctions and infusions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and stems in hot water, and are often used to treat various ailments.
